svg.title: Odylith benchmark frontier
svg.text: Live Benchmark: time to valid outcome vs live session input
The main field is zoomed to the dense scenario cluster so long-tail cases do not flatten the rest. Left and down
is better for live session input and time to valid outcome.
Static chart: Focus window | 35 of 37 scenarios in frame
Main field caps at 2M live session input tokens and 5m 00s to keep the dense cluster legible.
Each line links the same benchmark
The main field caps at 2M tokens and
Odylith on wins on both time to
on both time to valid outcome
